mapper.select: SELECT trait_apk_id AS traitApkId, trait_name AS traitName, trait_desc AS traitDesc, effect_type AS effectType, effect_value AS effectValue, troop_restrict AS troopRestrict, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM general_famous_trait WHERE general_pre_id = #{generalPreId} ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT t.trait_apk_id AS traitApkId, t.trait_name AS traitName, t.trait_desc AS traitDesc, t.effect_type AS effectType, t.effect_value AS effectValue, t.troop_restrict AS troopRestrict, t.sort_order AS sortOrder FROM general_famous_trait t INNER JOIN general_pre p ON t.general_pre_id = p.id WHERE p.name = #{name} AND p.is_berserk = 0 ORDER BY t.sort_order
